description: Enterprise review controls for authorised, low-noise recon readiness. Values are policy data, not code hardcoding.

standards_alignment.alignment: planning, rules of engagement, execution evidence, post-test reporting
web information gathering and architecture mapping without attack payloads
shared language for environment context and evidence interpretation
scope, communication, approvals and reporting expectations

review_controls.name: Human approval gates before high-visibility validation
AD, Entra ID and cloud passive discovery

limitations: Recon module does not attempt SOC bypass, authentication attacks, exploitation, persistence or evasion.
Default demo policy permits private lab targets; company review should require explicit signed allow-lists.
RBAC, multi-tenancy and enterprise secret vault integration are productisation controls, not FYP recon-only execution controls.

decision_rules.readiness_basis: Collect only evidence needed for handoff; pause before high-visibility validation or exploitation.

nmap_syn.soc_view: Staged TCP discovery can still appear as port fan-out from one source.
nmap_syn.operator_action: Keep packet rate within policy, limit stages, and document business justification.

nmap_service.soc_view: Banner-first identity collection is lower impact than broad scripts but still observable.
nmap_service.operator_action: Restrict to critical ports and stop when product/version evidence is sufficient.

nmap_http.soc_view: HTTP headers/title collection creates normal-looking requests but remains attributable.
nmap_http.operator_action: Prefer HEAD/single-page GET; avoid brute-force discovery unless approved.

smb_protocol.soc_view: SMB protocol probing is commonly investigated because it resembles lateral-movement preparation.
smb_protocol.operator_action: Collect protocol/signing readiness only; do not enumerate shares/users in recon.

credential_activity.soc_view: Credential validation is intentionally outside recon scope.
credential_activity.operator_action: Require explicit downstream approval; do not run from recon.

generic_active_probe.soc_view: Any active probe may be visible to defenders.
generic_active_probe.operator_action: Keep within RoE, record evidence and stop when sufficient.
